caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The scene is set up as a split-screen interview, with Margaret Harrington on the left and Greg Delanty on the right. Margaret is seated in a cozy environment adorned with string lights, while Greg is in a room with a blue wall and an "OPEN" sign visible behind him. Both participants are engaged in conversation, with Greg gesturing slightly as he speaks, possibly emphasizing points related to his poetry or the climate crisis theme. The overall atmosphere suggests a thoughtful and serious dialogue aimed at raising awareness about environmental issues through the medium of poetry.
